title: Sam Hickman First Woman
description: A comedy harp concert, what an original premise. Maybe just come for that? Unapologetically queer, gorgeous and filthy; join Hickman on a mad romp through love, romance, sex, friendship, motherhood, trauma, the 2002 television series Monk, and Jesus. A spellbinding comedy, not to be missed! This show is mostly about religious trauma and medical transition. FUN!
content_warnings: Rude/Crude humour, strong language, transphobia, suicidal ideation, Original Music

venue.name: Komedia Studio
venue.address: 44-47 Gardner Street, 44-46 Gardner Street, East Sussex
